description: Content Team Agent Pipeline — multi-agent blog post generation with research, adversarial editing, SEO/GEO optimization, and Remotion Lambda video visualization for all 3 post types

userStories.title: DB migration: blog_posts columns + blog_pipeline_runs table
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the database schema updated to store pipeline metadata (scores, video URL, post type) and track pipeline run state.
acceptanceCriteria: Create supabase/migrations/20260403_blog_pipeline_schema.sql

ALTER TABLE blog_posts adds: video_url text, slop_score smallint, seo_score smallint, geo_score smallint, citability_score smallint, post_type text, editorial_notes jsonb DEFAULT '[]', research_sources jsonb DEFAULT '[]' — all IF NOT EXISTS

CREATE TABLE blog_pipeline_runs: id uuid PK, post_type text NOT NULL, backlog_id uuid, status text DEFAULT 'running', phase text, blog_post_id uuid, error text, started_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(), completed_at timestamptz
RLS enabled on blog_pipeline_runs with no public policies (service role only)
Migration applied to Supabase project usmgbihcevnvrkyvrlju via MCP
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Applied via Supabase MCP. Also fixed CrawledItem urlHash/score fields in generate-timely-post.ts.

userStories.title: Install @remotion/lambda and create trigger.config.ts
userStories.description: As a developer, I need @remotion/lambda installed and trigger.config.ts created so the pipeline can render videos via Lambda and deploy to Trigger.dev.
acceptanceCriteria: @remotion/lambda added to package.json dependencies via npm install
Create trigger.config.ts at project root importing defineConfig from '@trigger.dev/sdk/v3' using relative imports only (no @/ alias — c12/jiti does not read tsconfig paths)

trigger.config.ts sets: tsconfig: 'tsconfig.json', runtime: 'node', maxDuration: 600, retries default 2, dirs: ['src/trigger'], legacyDevProcessCwdBehaviour: false (makes process.cwd() consistent between dev and production — both point to build dir), build.additionalFiles: ['src/lib/blog-pipeline/skills/**/*.md']
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: additionalFiles is top-level (deprecated but functional); retries.default is RetryOptions object {maxAttempts:2}, not number.

userStories.title: Bundle skill files into repo and create loadSkill() utility
userStories.description: As a developer, I need skill content available at runtime in cloud workers since ~/.claude/skills/ doesn't exist there.
acceptanceCriteria: Directory src/lib/blog-pipeline/skills/ created
src/lib/blog-pipeline/skills/humanizer.md contains full content of ~/.claude/skills/humanizer/SKILL.md
src/lib/blog-pipeline/skills/stop-slop.md contains full content of ~/.claude/skills/stop-slop/SKILL.md
src/lib/blog-pipeline/skills/geo-content.md contains full content of ~/.claude/skills/geo-content/SKILL.md
src/lib/blog-pipeline/skills/geo-citability.md contains full content of ~/.claude/skills/geo-citability/SKILL.md
src/lib/blog-pipeline/skills/on-page.md contains full content of ~/.claude/skills/on-page/SKILL.md
Create src/lib/blog-pipeline/skills.ts with loadSkill(name: string): string using readFileSync(join(process.cwd(), 'src/lib/blog-pipeline/skills', name + '.md'), 'utf-8')
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: All 5 skills copied from ~/.claude/skills/*/SKILL.md. loadSkill() utility created.

userStories.title: Extended TypeScript types for pipeline phases
userStories.description: As a developer, I need typed interfaces for each pipeline phase so handoffs between agents are type-safe.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/lib/blog-pipeline/types.ts adding: AnalystResult, ResearchFindings, ResearchBrief, EditorOutput, SeoOutput, VisualDesignerOutput, AssemblyInput, PipelineResult interfaces
AnalystResult includes: query, angle, postType ('keyword'|'timely'|'case_study'), competitorGaps?, serpFAQs?, twitterHook?, researchBriefing, backlogId?
ResearchBrief includes: topInsights, keyNumbers, citableSources, faqQuestions, recommendedAngle, internalLinks — all string arrays
EditorOutput includes: revisedBodyMdx string, editorialNotes string[], slopScore number
SeoOutput includes: revisedBodyMdx string, revisedExcerpt string, seoNotes string[], geoScore number, citabilityScore number
VisualDesignerOutput includes: videoUrl string|null, compositionId string|null, inputProps Record<string,unknown>|null, visualConcept string
Existing types (BlogDraft, CrawledItem, TopicSelection) unchanged
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: All phase interfaces added. AssemblyInput and PipelineResult added for orchestrator handoff.

userStories.title: Analyst module (Phase 1)
userStories.description: As the pipeline orchestrator, I need an analyst that selects the right topic and angle based on post type.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/blog-pipeline/analyst.ts exporting runAnalyst(postType, context?): Promise<AnalystResult | null>

Keyword path: pulls top-priority queued blog_topic_backlog row ordered by priority ASC then created_at ASC, marks status='in_progress', calls DataForSEO for SERP top-5 and PAA questions, identifies content gap, returns AnalystResult
Timely path: accepts context.crawledItems array, scores by recency + physical AI relevance via Claude API call, picks highest-signal item, sets twitterHook
Case study path: pulls next queued blog_case_studies row ordered by created_at ASC, returns AnalystResult
Returns null (never throws) when no eligible content found
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: DataForSEO called via direct HTTP (Basic auth). Gap analysis via Claude sonnet. Never throws — try/catch at top level.

userStories.title: Research team module (Phase 2)
userStories.description: As the pipeline orchestrator, I need 4 parallel research agents that ground the writer in real sources.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/blog-pipeline/research.ts exporting runResearchTeam(analystResult: AnalystResult): Promise<ResearchBrief>

4 agents run via Promise.allSettled: arXiv (WebFetch arxiv.org search URL), HN (uses crawlHackerNews()), web (WebFetch on search results), SERP Analyst (DataForSEO, keyword only — skipped for timely/case_study returning empty)
arXiv agent returns { sources: [], keyInsights: ['No relevant arXiv papers found'] } when 0 papers match — never fabricates citations
Each agent caps output at 10 items per array
Individual agent failures are caught and logged — synthesizer proceeds with available data
Synthesizer API call merges all ResearchFindings into ResearchBrief
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: All 4 agents use Promise.allSettled. arXiv never fabricates — explicit fallback text. Web uses DuckDuckGo HTML. SERP skipped for timely/case_study.

userStories.title: Writer module (Phase 3)
userStories.description: As the pipeline orchestrator, I need a writer that produces a grounded first draft using the research brief.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/blog-pipeline/writer.ts exporting runWriter(analystResult: AnalystResult, brief: ResearchBrief): Promise<BlogDraft | null>
Imports VOICE_SYSTEM_PROMPT from generate.ts — does not duplicate it
User prompt includes analystResult.angle, brief.citableSources formatted as a sources list, and brief.faqQuestions
Returns BlogDraft (title, slug, excerpt, tags, body_mdx, source_urls, mentions) or null on parse failure
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Adversarial editor module (Phase 4A)
userStories.description: As the pipeline orchestrator, I need an editor that strips AI writing patterns from the draft.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/blog-pipeline/editor.ts exporting runEditor(bodyMdx: string): Promise<EditorOutput>
System prompt concatenates: editor role description + loadSkill('humanizer') + loadSkill('stop-slop')
Prompt instructs three passes: stop-slop checklist, humanizer rewrite of flagged passages, adversarial 'what makes this AI-generated?' question + rewrites top 3 answers, then scores 1-10
If slopScore < 7: runs one additional Claude call for a retry pass
If still < 7 after retry: appends 'slopScore below threshold after 2 passes' to editorialNotes and proceeds
Always returns EditorOutput — never throws
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: SEO/GEO optimizer module (Phase 4B)
userStories.description: As the pipeline orchestrator, I need an SEO/GEO agent that ensures the post ranks and gets cited by AI systems.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/blog-pipeline/seo-optimizer.ts exporting runSeoOptimizer(bodyMdx: string, excerpt: string, analystResult: AnalystResult): Promise<SeoOutput>
System prompt: SEO role + loadSkill('geo-content') + loadSkill('geo-citability') + loadSkill('on-page')

Prompt instructs: H1 exact-match check, rewrite sections with citability < 50 to open with direct answer, E-E-A-T check, replace FAQ headings with analystResult.serpFAQs verbatim, rewrite excerpt to start with number or named entity
If geoScore < 65: one retry pass
If still < 65: proceeds, appends flag to seoNotes
Returns SeoOutput — this body is the final body used in assembly
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Remotion blog-visuals compositions (5 parameterized templates)
userStories.description: As the visual designer, I need 5 pre-built Remotion compositions covering the visual types for all 3 post types.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/remotion/blog-visuals/shared/colors.ts: export const BG='#0a0908', ACCENT='#92B090', TEXT='#FFFFFF'
Create BlogStatCallout.tsx: Zod schema { stat: z.string(), label: z.string(), context: z.string() }, stat animates up with spring, 8s at 30fps
Create BlogDataComparison.tsx: Zod schema { title: z.string(), rows: z.array(z.object({ label: z.string(), a: z.string(), b: z.string() })) }, rows stagger in, 10s
Create BlogTimeline.tsx: Zod schema { events: z.array(z.object({ date: z.string(), label: z.string() })).max(5) }, events appear sequentially, 12s
Create BlogMetricReveal.tsx: Zod schema { before: z.string(), after: z.string(), metric: z.string() }, before fades to after, 8s
Create BlogProcessSteps.tsx: Zod schema { steps: z.array(z.string()).max(5) }, steps build up with numbered reveal, 10s
Create src/remotion/blog-visuals/index.ts exporting BLOG_VISUAL_COMPOSITION_IDS as const string array of all 5 IDs
All 5 compositions registered in src/remotion/Root.tsx under a 'blog-visuals' folder
All compositions use colors from shared/colors.ts
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Visual designer module (Phase 4C)
userStories.description: As the pipeline orchestrator, I need a visual designer that selects a composition and triggers Remotion Lambda rendering.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/blog-pipeline/visual-designer.ts exporting runVisualDesigner(bodyMdx: string, slug: string, postType: string): Promise<VisualDesignerOutput>
If process.env.SKIP_REMOTION === 'true': returns { videoUrl: null, compositionId: null, inputProps: null, visualConcept: 'skipped' } immediately
API call selects compositionId from BLOG_VISUAL_COMPOSITION_IDS and extracts typed inputProps matching that composition's Zod schema from the post body

Calls renderMediaOnLambda from '@remotion/lambda/client' with: region 'us-east-1', functionName: REMOTION_LAMBDA_FUNCTION_NAME env, serveUrl: REMOTION_SERVE_URL env, outName: { key: 'blog-visuals/{slug}.mp4', bucketName: 'moonvalley-annotation-platform' }
Polls getRenderProgress every 3000ms, throws after 90 attempts (270s timeout)
On Lambda fatalErrorEncountered: throws error
On any error: catches, logs, returns { videoUrl: null, compositionId, inputProps, visualConcept } — never rethrows to caller
On success: returns videoUrl as 'https://d301h7ygdmxuux.cloudfront.net/blog-visuals/{slug}.mp4'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Assembler module (Phase 5)
userStories.description: As the pipeline orchestrator, I need an assembler that merges all phase outputs into a final blog_posts record.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/blog-pipeline/assembler.ts exporting runAssembler(input: AssemblyInput): Promise<{ postId: string } | null>
Inserts video embed '<video src="{videoUrl}" autoPlay loop muted playsInline />' after first '---' or first '## ' in body, before second '## ' — skips entirely if videoUrl is null
For postType='timely': makes Claude API call to generate 5-7 tweet Twitter thread from final body using analystResult.twitterHook as tweet 1; stores in twitter_thread

Inserts to blog_posts with status='pending_review' and columns: slop_score, seo_score (maps from geoScore), geo_score, citability_score, post_type, editorial_notes (JSON array), research_sources (top 5 citableSources from ResearchBrief), video_url, twitter_thread
If visualConcept mentions a number not present in the final body: appends 'visual may reference outdated stat — review before publishing' to editorialNotes
Returns { postId } on success, null on insert failure
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update notify.ts with scores and video
userStories.description: As a content reviewer, I want the Slack notification to show quality scores and video link so I can assess the post before opening the admin queue.
acceptanceCriteria: Update notifySlack in src/lib/blog-pipeline/notify.ts to accept optional 5th arg: scores?: { slopScore?: number, geoScore?: number, citabilityScore?: number, videoUrl?: string|null, editorialNotes?: string[], researchSources?: string[] }
Slack message adds a section with fields: 'Slop: {slopScore}/10', 'GEO: {geoScore}/100', 'Citability: {citabilityScore}/100' when scores provided
If videoUrl non-null: adds button element '🎬 Preview Video' linking to videoUrl
If videoUrl null and scores provided: adds context block text '⚠️ No video rendered'
If editorialNotes non-empty: adds section with first 3 notes joined by newline
Existing 4-argument calls to notifySlack still compile and work unchanged
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Orchestrator module
userStories.description: As the Trigger.dev task, I need an orchestrator that runs all pipeline phases with proper state tracking, error isolation, and parallel execution.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/blog-pipeline/orchestrator.ts exporting runPipeline(postType, context?): Promise<PipelineResult>
Creates blog_pipeline_runs row at start with status='running'
Updates phase field at each transition: 'analyst', 'research', 'writer', 'editor', 'seo', 'visual', 'assembly', 'complete'
Idempotency: if blog_pipeline_runs row exists with same backlog_id and status='complete', returns early with success:true
Phase 4A (editor) and 4B (SEO) run sequentially; Phase 4C (visual) runs concurrently via Promise.allSettled alongside the 4A→4B chain
Each phase failure caught and logged individually; pipeline continues where possible
If writer returns null: marks run status='failed' and returns PipelineResult { success: false, error: 'writer returned null' }
On complete: updates blog_pipeline_runs.status='complete', blog_post_id, completed_at
Calls notifySlack with all scores from SeoOutput, EditorOutput, VisualDesignerOutput
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update weeklyBlogPipeline to use orchestrator
userStories.description: As the weekly cron job, I need to delegate to the new orchestrator for all 3 post types.
acceptanceCriteria: Update src/trigger/blog-pipeline.ts to import runPipeline from orchestrator
Keyword post: calls runPipeline('keyword') — orchestrator selects backlog internally

Timely post: pre-crawls using existing crawlArxiv/crawlHackerNews/crawlRedditRss/crawlRssFeeds, deduplicates via deduplicateAndStore, passes new items as context.crawledItems to runPipeline('timely', { crawledItems: newItems })
Case study post: calls runPipeline('case_study')
Each post type in independent try/catch — one failure does not block others
generate.ts exports (generateKeywordDraft, generateDraft, selectTopics) remain unchanged and still compile
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Orphan cleanup scheduled task
userStories.description: As the system, I need a cron job that resets stuck in_progress rows so the pipeline can retry them.
acceptanceCriteria: Add second schedules.task to src/trigger/blog-pipeline.ts with id='blog-pipeline-orphan-cleanup', cron='*/30 * * * *', maxDuration: 30
Resets blog_topic_backlog rows where status='in_progress' AND updated_at < now() - interval '2 hours' back to status='queued'
Resets blog_case_studies rows with same condition
Updates blog_pipeline_runs rows where status='running' AND started_at < now() - interval '2 hours' to status='failed', error='orphan cleanup'
Logs count of each table's reset rows
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Seed script for content team testing
userStories.description: As a developer, I need idempotent seed data to exercise the full pipeline without manual DB setup.
acceptanceCriteria: Create scripts/seed-content-team-test.ts
Upserts blog_topic_backlog row { query: 'diffusion policy training data', priority: 1, status: 'queued', post_type: 'keyword' } — checks existing by query before insert

Upserts blog_case_studies row { company: 'Test Lab', headline: '10,000 episodes collected in 2 weeks', challenge: 'Needed diverse manipulation data at scale', solution: 'Deployed 50 egocentric collectors across 3 cities', results: 'Policy achieved 78% success rate on held-out tasks', data_types: ['egocentric_video', 'teleop'], status: 'queued' }
Deletes blog_pipeline_runs rows where started_at < now() - interval '10 minutes' AND status='running'
Add to package.json scripts: 'seed:content-team': 'tsx scripts/seed-content-team-test.ts'
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: End-to-end test script
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a test script that runs the full pipeline with SKIP_REMOTION=true and verifies all acceptance criteria.
acceptanceCriteria: Create scripts/test-content-team.ts that sets process.env.SKIP_REMOTION='true' before any imports
Calls seed logic to ensure test data exists
Calls runPipeline('keyword') and captures result
Asserts: result.success === true
Asserts: blog_posts row with returned postId has status='pending_review', body_mdx.length >= 1200, slop_score >= 1, geo_score >= 1
Asserts: blog_pipeline_runs row with status='complete'
Asserts: editor output body does not contain the string 'game-changing' or 'comprehensive'
Logs 'PASS' or 'FAIL: {actual}' for each assertion
Add to package.json scripts: 'test:content-team': 'SKIP_REMOTION=true tsx scripts/test-content-team.ts'
Typecheck passes
